modules.name: Virtualization, Containers, and Docker
modules.description: Introduction to virtualization concepts, container technology, Docker fundamentals, and core Docker CLI commands for containerized development environments.

lessons.title: Introduction to Containers
topics: What containers are and how they work

lessons.title: Introduction to Docker
topics: What Docker is and its purpose
Running containers locally and in the cloud

lessons.title: Docker Commands Core
topics: Docker artifacts: images, containers, registries, tags
Core image commands: pull, build, rmi
Core container commands: ps, start, stop, rm
Running and executing commands in containers

modules.name: Databases
modules.description: Overview of database types, relational vs. non-relational databases, RDBMS components, and common database terminology.

lessons.title: Database Types
topics: Tables, rows, columns, and primary keys
Key-value, document, columnar, and graph databases

modules.name: Relational Modeling
modules.description: Relational database terminology, data types, data relationships, normalization through third normal form, and entity relationship diagram (ERD) creation.

lessons.title: Normalization
topics: Denormalization and when to use it

modules.name: Database Instance Installs
modules.description: Installing and configuring MySQL, MySQL Workbench, SQL Server Express, and Azure Data Studio for hands-on database development.

lessons.title: SQL Server Express and Azure Data Studio Setup
topics: Running queries in Azure Data Studio

modules.name: Database Creation and Maintenance
modules.description: Data Definition Language (DDL) for creating databases, tables, and relationships using database scripts in both MySQL and SQL Express dialects.

lessons.title: Database Scripts
topics: CREATE DATABASE and CREATE TABLE statements
Defining columns, data types, and constraints
Primary key and foreign key creation
MySQL vs. SQL Express DDL dialect differences

modules.name: SQL Fundamentals
modules.description: Writing SELECT statements, working with math and string operations, filtering results with WHERE clauses, and ordering output with ORDER BY.

lessons.title: Selects
topics: Working with literal values and expressions
Math and string operations in SQL
Selecting from tables and aliasing columns

lessons.title: Filtering SQL
topics: NULL handling with IS NULL / IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY clause for sorting results

modules.name: Intermediate SQL
modules.description: SQL JOINs for combining tables, case sensitivity and data formatting, subqueries, and aggregate functions with GROUP BY and HAVING.

lessons.title: Case, Casting, and Formatting
topics: Explicit casting with CAST() and CONVERT()
String formatting: trimming, concatenation, case conversion

lessons.title: Aggregation in SQL
topics: Aggregate functions: SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX, COUNT
GROUP BY clause for grouping results
SQL variables and ORDER BY with aggregates

modules.name: Advanced SQL
modules.description: Data Manipulation Language (DML) for inserting, updating, and deleting records, including foreign key interactions and safe data modification practices.

lessons.title: Updating SQL
topics: UPDATE single record with WHERE clause

lessons.title: Deleting SQL
topics: DELETE single record by primary key
Deleting multiple records with filtered WHERE
Safe deletion practices with SELECT preview

modules.name: Stored Procedures and Transactions
modules.description: Writing and calling stored procedures with parameters, using SQL transactions for safe data modification with commit and rollback.

modules.name: JDBC
modules.description: Java Database Connectivity (JDBC) for connecting Java applications to databases, and Spring JdbcTemplate for simplified database access.
